raw_consumer_statement: Canceled subscription Wi-Fi service on XX/XX/year> and have been charged for XXXX, XXXX, XXXX and XXXX. I started the service in XXXX and there is only one legitimate charge. The credit card company refuses to stop allowing charges to hit my account even after I have repeatedly notified them I do not authorize these charges and canceled directly with the merchant. Barclays bank has told me I need to mail them letters to get them to look at the dispute cases again.
